emails.subject: Vision Ace Hardware — calls when you're helping another customer
emails.body:
Hey Douglas,

Vision Ace Hardware came up when I was looking at independent hardware stores in Naples — great local alternative to the big box stores.

Here's what I see with independent hardware: customers call asking about specific items, tool rentals, or specialty supplies. If they can't get through quickly, they assume you don't have it and order on Amazon instead — even if you had exactly what they needed.

I build AI phone systems that handle those calls — answers availability questions, checks inventory status, and tells customers what to expect when they come in.

I build and run it free for 2 weeks so you can see how many calls it handles before deciding if it's worth paying for.

Worth a 15-minute call?

William Marceau
Marceau Solutions
wmarceau@marceausolutions.com
emails.pain_point: Customers calling about item availability hit a busy counter and assume you don't have it — they order online instead of coming in
emails.hook: Independent hardware competes on service and local knowledge; unanswered calls send customers to Amazon

emails.subject: Expressions Furniture — customers calling after showroom hours
emails.body:
Hey Jason,

Expressions Model Furniture Outlet came up when I was looking at furniture showrooms in Naples — interesting model with the model home angle.

High-end furniture buyers browse online at night and call when something catches their eye. If they hit voicemail after hours, they don't leave a message — they move to the next showroom on Google.

I build AI intake systems for showrooms that handle those after-hours inquiries — captures what the customer is looking for, answers availability questions, and schedules a showroom visit.

I build and run it free for 2 weeks so you can see how many inquiries it catches before deciding if it's worth paying for.

Worth a quick call?

William Marceau
Marceau Solutions
wmarceau@marceausolutions.com
emails.pain_point: Furniture buyers browse and call at night — after-hours voicemail sends high-intent customers to the next showroom
emails.hook: High-end furniture is a considered purchase driven by availability and design fit; first showroom to respond wins the visit

emails.subject: Fundamental Health Solutions — new patient inquiry timing
emails.body:
Hey Stephen,

Came across Fundamental Health Solutions while looking at integrative practices in Naples — strong positioning for patients who want more than conventional care.

Functional medicine patients are self-motivated — they've already done the research and they're ready to pay out of pocket for the right provider. But they're also shopping. If they call your practice and get voicemail while a competitor answers, you've lost a long-term patient.

I build AI intake systems for cash-pay practices — answers calls 24/7, handles new patient questions, books the initial consultation.

I build and run the full system free for 2 weeks so you can see the actual patients it captures before committing to anything.

Worth a quick call?

William Marceau
Marceau Solutions
wmarceau@marceausolutions.com
emails.pain_point: Functional medicine patients are high-intent cash-pay but shopping multiple providers — first to respond wins the long-term patient relationship
emails.hook: Cash-pay functional medicine patients have already decided to invest; gap is responsiveness not value

emails.subject: Zehr Center for Orthopaedics — after-hours new patient calls
emails.body:
Hey Robert,

Came across Zehr Center for Orthopaedics while looking at specialty practices in Naples — well-regarded in the area.

Orthopaedic patients are often in pain and looking for the earliest available appointment. They call after work or on weekends when they finally have time. If they get voicemail, they call the next orthopaedic office in their network — not because your practice is worse, but because someone else answered.

I build AI intake systems for specialty practices that handle those calls — answers new patient questions, checks availability, and schedules the appointment.

I build and run the full system free for 2 weeks so you can see how many new patient calls it captures before you decide if it's worth paying for.

Worth 15 minutes?

William Marceau
Marceau Solutions
wmarceau@marceausolutions.com
emails.pain_point: Orthopaedic patients in pain call after work/weekends — voicemail means they call the next provider in their network immediately
emails.hook: Pain creates urgency; orthopaedic patients won't wait until Monday when another practice answers Sunday afternoon

emails.subject: Daane Properties — evening buyer and seller inquiries
emails.body:
Hey Alexander,

Came across Daane Properties while looking at Naples brokerages — strong presence in the local market.

Real estate leads have almost no patience. A buyer or seller calls in the evening when they're finally thinking clearly about making a move. If they get voicemail, they don't leave a message — they call the next agent on Google.

I build AI phone systems for real estate businesses that respond to those calls immediately — captures contact details, answers questions about listings or the selling process, and schedules a callback.

I build and run the full system free for 2 weeks so you can see how many inquiries it catches before deciding if it's worth paying for.

Worth a quick call?

William Marceau
Marceau Solutions
wmarceau@marceausolutions.com
emails.pain_point: Evening buyer/seller inquiries hit voicemail — motivated prospects call the next broker immediately rather than waiting
emails.hook: Real estate leads are time-sensitive and competition is one Google search away

emails.subject: SW Florida Mortgage Solutions — rate shopping calls
emails.body:
Hey Marisa,

Came across SW Florida Mortgage Solutions while looking at local lenders in Naples — solid independent operation.

Mortgage borrowers shop fast. When rates are moving or someone's ready to buy, they call 2-3 brokers in the same afternoon. Whoever calls back first with a real number tends to earn the relationship — the others get "we already went with someone, thanks."

I build AI intake systems for mortgage businesses that respond to those calls within minutes — captures the borrower's basic info, answers initial questions about rates and programs, and schedules your call.

I build and run the full system free for 2 weeks so you can see how many inquiries it catches before deciding if it's worth paying for.

Worth 15 minutes?

William Marceau
Marceau Solutions
wmarceau@marceausolutions.com
emails.pain_point: Mortgage borrowers rate-shop multiple brokers simultaneously — first to call back with a real number earns the file
emails.hook: Rate shopping is fast and competitive; borrowers make the decision based on who responds first with substance

emails.subject: Quail Communities Realty — buyer inquiries after hours
emails.body:
Hey Jackie,

Came across Quail Communities Realty while researching Naples brokerages — strong niche with the community focus.

Buyers interested in community living do their research online at night and call when they're serious. If they can't reach anyone, they contact the next brokerage that specializes in the same communities. The opportunity window is short.

I build AI phone systems that respond to those inquiries immediately — captures what communities the buyer is interested in, answers initial questions, and books a time with you.

I build and run the full system free for 2 weeks so you can see how many inquiries it catches before deciding if it's worth paying for.

Worth a quick call?

William Marceau
Marceau Solutions
wmarceau@marceausolutions.com
emails.pain_point: Community-focused buyers research online at night and call when serious — unanswered calls go to the next specialist immediately
emails.hook: Niche real estate (community living) has a small buyer pool; every missed inquiry is a significant missed opportunity

emails.subject: Monarch Builders — estimate request calls you miss
emails.body:
Hey Chad,

Monarch Builders & Remodelers came up when I was looking at Naples remodeling contractors — solid reputation for custom work.

Here's what I keep seeing with remodelers: a homeowner decides they want a kitchen or bathroom done and calls 3 contractors the same day. Whoever gets back with a walkthrough date first tends to win the project — not always on price, just on responsiveness.

I build AI systems for contractors that handle those first calls — responds within 2 minutes, qualifies the project scope, and books the estimate appointment.

I build and run the whole thing free for 2 weeks so you can see exactly what you're currently losing to voicemail before deciding if it's worth paying for.

Worth a quick call?

William Marceau
Marceau Solutions
wmarceau@marceausolutions.com
emails.pain_point: Homeowners call 3 remodelers same day — first to schedule a walkthrough wins the project regardless of price
emails.hook: Remodeling estimates are won on speed and perceived professionalism; first callback signals the contractor takes the job seriously

emails.subject: Calusa Bay Design — inquiry calls from evening browsing
emails.body:
Hey Leslie,

Came across Calusa Bay Design while looking at Naples interior design firms — beautiful portfolio, strong local presence.

Interior design clients almost always reach out after hours — they're browsing Instagram or Houzz at 9pm, see something that inspires them, and send a message or call. If they don't hear back before the next morning, the feeling fades and they move on.

I build AI intake systems for design firms that respond to those inquiries within minutes — captures the client's vision, project scope, and timeline, and schedules the initial consultation.

I build and run the full system free for 2 weeks so you can see how many evening inquiries it recovers before deciding if it's worth paying for.

Worth 15 minutes?

William Marceau
Marceau Solutions
wmarceau@marceausolutions.com
emails.pain_point: Design clients browse and reach out at night — impulse-driven inquiries fade by morning if there's no immediate response
emails.hook: Interior design decisions are emotionally driven; same-night response captures the inspiration moment before it passes
